holdings.n: Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class

overview.description: The Invesco BulletShares 2030 Corporate Bond ETF (BSCU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated corporate investment grade bonds with effective maturities in 2030. BSCU was launched on Sep 16, 2020 and is issued by Invesco.
